title: aira indica
intro: Aira indica, also known as Black Millet Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aira indica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments, salves, and other topical preparations.
